page_content:
PERS406 Practicum in Persian Translation (6 Credits)

Provides opportunities for translation, interpretation, and analysis of various authentic oral and written texts (both English to Persian and Persian to English). Facilitates the development of Persian language proficiency at advanced level through a task-based approach that integrates all the language skills in pedagogical translation activities. Prerequisite: PERS306; or equivalent as determined by the World Language Placement (WLP).

PERS498 Special Topics in Persian Studies (3 Credits) Topic and language to be announced when offered. Prerequisite: Permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
